checkpoint: Faction boost_weight: cards aligned with player's high-rep factions (>=50) now appear more often in FastRoute and Event pools. Two weighting signals: biome dominant_faction (+1.5) and card effect ADD_REPUTATION factions (+2.0 each). _compute_faction_boost() static method + _weighted_pick() replace random selection. Controller passes faction_rep in FastRoute context. 2 files, 63 lines. 25 bugs fixed across 14 cycles.
